no-restricted-syntax.message: Hardcoded currency code detected. Accept currency_format as a parameter from user preferences (e.g. prefs.currency_format ?? DEFAULT_CURRENCY) instead of hardcoding.
Hardcoded currency symbol in a string. User-facing amounts must be formatted with formatAmount(amount, currency) using the user's currency_format, never a literal $/€/£.
Hardcoded currency symbol in a template literal. User-facing amounts must be formatted with formatAmount(amount, currency) using the user's currency_format, never a literal $/€/£.
